nodes.label: constants
nodes.docstring: Immutable project-wide constants. Nothing configurable belongs here.

nodes.label: sdk
nodes.docstring:
Public SDK facade — single entry point for all debate logic.
External consumers (CLI, tests, REST) use this only. All messages
flow child→JudgeAgent→child as typed Pydantic Message objects.

nodes.label: _parse_argument
nodes.docstring:
Extract argument text and references from agent JSON response.
Three-stage: json.loads → embedded scan → regex fallback for malformed JSON.

nodes.label: DebateSDK
nodes.docstring: Orchestrates a full Pro-vs-Con debate supervised by a Judge agent.

nodes.label: DebateSDK.run
nodes.docstring: Run a full debate; returns {"topic", "transcript", "verdict", "token_usage"}.

nodes.label: DebateSDK._build_infrastructure
nodes.docstring: Instantiate shared infrastructure: logger, gatekeeper, watchdog.

nodes.label: DebateSDK._open_debate
nodes.docstring: Pro agent opens the debate; Judge routes to Con (child→papa→child).

nodes.label: DebateSDK._run_rounds
nodes.docstring: Execute debate rounds; judge routes every message, reserves budget for verdict.

nodes.label: DebateSDK._con_turn
nodes.docstring: Con turn: argue → judge routes → transcript (child→papa→child).

nodes.label: DebateSDK._pro_turn
nodes.docstring: Pro turn: argue → judge routes → transcript (child→papa→child).

nodes.label: DebateSDK._save_transcript
nodes.docstring: Persist transcript and verdict to JSONL log directory.

nodes.label: __init__
nodes.docstring: AI Agent Debate System — public package entry point.

nodes.label: debate_result
nodes.docstring: Typed result returned by the Judge at the end of the debate.

nodes.label: DebateResult
nodes.docstring:
Structured verdict produced by the Judge agent.

winner must always be 'Pro' or 'Con' — ties are forbidden by the assignment.

nodes.label: DebateResult.winner_must_not_be_tie
nodes.docstring: Enforce the no-tie rule at the data layer.

nodes.label: DebateResult.scores_in_range
nodes.docstring: Scores must be 0–100.

nodes.label: DebateResult.to_dict
nodes.docstring: Serialize for SDK return value.

nodes.label: message
nodes.docstring: Typed inter-agent message passed as JSON over IPC (child → papa → child).

nodes.label: Message
nodes.docstring:
Represents one argument in the debate, serializable as JSON for IPC.

Every message flows: sender → Judge → recipient.
The Judge observes, routes, and logs each Message before forwarding.
`sender` and

nodes.label: Message.to_ipc_dict
nodes.docstring: Serialize to JSON-safe dict for inter-process communication.

nodes.label: Message.from_ipc_dict
nodes.docstring: Deserialize from IPC dict back to a typed Message.

nodes.label: Message.summary
nodes.docstring: One-line representation for logging.

nodes.label: __init__
nodes.docstring: Data type definitions for inter-agent JSON IPC communication.

nodes.label: watchdog
nodes.docstring:
Watchdog — timeout and exponential back-off retry wrapper.

Every autonomous agent project must have a Watchdog (§8.6).
Wraps any callable with a configurable timeout and retry logic.
If a process sta

nodes.label: WatchdogTimeoutError
nodes.docstring: Raised when all retry attempts are exhausted due to timeouts.

nodes.label: Watchdog
nodes.docstring:
Wraps any callable with timeout + exponential back-off retry.

Designed for autonomous agent environments where API calls may stall.
Each failed attempt is logged with elapsed milliseconds. After max_

nodes.label: Watchdog.__init__
nodes.docstring: Configure the watchdog with timeout and retry limits.

nodes.label: Watchdog.run
nodes.docstring:
Execute fn(*args, **kwargs) with timeout and retry on failure.

Uses ThreadPoolExecutor so the timeout is enforced even on blocking calls.
Back-off: sleeps 2^attempt seconds between retries (2s, 4s, 8

nodes.label: logger
nodes.docstring:
FIFO rotating structured JSONL logger.

Writes one JSON line per event to timestamped log files.
Rotates to a new file at max_lines. Deletes the oldest file
when max_files is exceeded — strict FIFO or

nodes.label: FIFOLogger
nodes.docstring:
Rotating JSONL logger with configurable file and line limits.

Each log entry is one JSON line: {"ts", "level", "source", "msg"}.
A single corrupt line never breaks the entire file (JSONL advantage).

nodes.label: FIFOLogger.__init__
nodes.docstring: Create or resume a rotating log session in log_dir.

nodes.label: FIFOLogger._log_files
nodes.docstring: Return sorted list of all existing debate log files.

nodes.label: FIFOLogger._open_current
nodes.docstring: Open the most recent log file if it has capacity; otherwise rotate.

nodes.label: FIFOLogger._rotate
nodes.docstring: Create a new log file, deleting the oldest if at max_files limit.

nodes.label: FIFOLogger.log
nodes.docstring: Write one JSONL entry. Rotates automatically at max_lines.

nodes.label: FIFOLogger.info
nodes.docstring: Log an informational event.

nodes.label: FIFOLogger.error
nodes.docstring: Log an error event.

nodes.label: FIFOLogger.warning
nodes.docstring: Log a warning event.

nodes.label: gatekeeper
nodes.docstring:
API Gatekeeper — central gateway for all external API calls.

Every call to the Anthropic API must go through Gatekeeper.execute().
This enforces token budget and RPM rate limits, logs every call, and

nodes.label: BudgetExceededError
nodes.docstring: Raised when cumulative token usage reaches the configured ceiling.

nodes.label: RateLimitExceededError
nodes.docstring: Raised when the requests-per-minute limit is hit and cannot recover.

nodes.label: Gatekeeper
nodes.docstring:
Centralized API call manager: enforces token budget, RPM rate limit, logs all calls.

All external API calls must be routed through execute() — never call
the Anthropic client directly from agent code

nodes.label: Gatekeeper.__init__
nodes.docstring: Initialize with a hard token ceiling and optional RPM limit (0 = unlimited).

nodes.label: Gatekeeper.total_tokens
nodes.docstring: Combined input + output tokens used so far.

nodes.label: Gatekeeper._enforce_rate_limit
nodes.docstring:
Block until the RPM sliding window has capacity.

Evicts timestamps older than 60 s, then sleeps if at limit.
Uses monotonic time to avoid wall-clock drift issues.

nodes.label: Gatekeeper.execute
nodes.docstring:
Execute an API call through the gateway.

Enforces RPM rate limit and budget before execution, records tokens after.
All Anthropic API calls must go through this method.

nodes.label: Gatekeeper.check_budget
nodes.docstring: Raise BudgetExceededError if the token ceiling has been reached.

nodes.label: Gatekeeper.record
nodes.docstring:
Accumulate token counts from a completed API response.

Also checks budget after recording — two-phase enforcement:
execute() checks before the call, record() checks after.

nodes.label: Gatekeeper.status
nodes.docstring: Return a snapshot of current usage, budget, and rate-limit state.

nodes.label: load_rate_limits
nodes.docstring: Load rate limits config; returns {} if file is missing.

nodes.label: __init__
nodes.docstring: Core infrastructure: config, gatekeeper, logger, watchdog.

nodes.label: debater_agent
nodes.docstring: Pro and Con debater agents — argue opposite sides of the debate topic.

nodes.label: ProAgent
nodes.docstring: AXIOM — aggressive PRO debater. Uses web_search for every argument.

nodes.label: ConAgent
nodes.docstring: NEMESIS — surgical CON debater. Uses web_search for every argument.

nodes.label: prompts
nodes.docstring:
System prompts for all three debate agents.

Kept in a dedicated module so each agent file stays under 150 lines
and prompts can be reviewed, tuned, and versioned independently.

nodes.label: judge_agent
nodes.docstring:
Judge (Papa) agent — routes all messages and declares the debate winner.

Every argument flows child → JudgeAgent → child.
The Judge enforces 8 debate rules before routing each message,
accumulates vi

nodes.label: RuleViolationError
nodes.docstring: Raised when a debater commits a critical rule violation.

nodes.label: JudgeAgent
nodes.docstring: Supervises the debate: checks all 8 rules, routes messages, declares winner.

nodes.label: JudgeAgent.observe
nodes.docstring:
Receive argument, run all 8 rule checks, log violations, route to next speaker.

Implements child→papa→child with full active moderation:
profanity, ad hominem, off-topic, empty, no-rebuttal,
concessi

nodes.label: JudgeAgent.declare_winner
nodes.docstring:
Evaluate full transcript + all violations and return final verdict.

Violations are shown to the judge so the offending side is penalised.
No ties allowed — always returns winner 'Pro' or 'Con'.

nodes.label: JudgeAgent._last_opponent_argument
nodes.docstring: Return the most recent argument from the opposing side, or None.

nodes.label: JudgeAgent._parse_route_and_check
nodes.docstring: Parse routing JSON and record all violations flagged by the judge.

nodes.label: JudgeAgent._parse_verdict
nodes.docstring: Extract structured verdict JSON and attach the full violation log.

nodes.label: base_agent
nodes.docstring:
Base agent: shared LLM call logic, tool execution, token tracking, watchdog.

All API calls go through Gatekeeper.execute() — never call the Anthropic
client directly. This enforces the API gateway pa

nodes.label: BaseAgent
nodes.docstring:
Common LLM call logic, tool execution, token tracking, and watchdog wrapping.

All subagents (Pro, Con, Judge) extend this class.
Every API call is routed through Gatekeeper.execute() — the single
aud

nodes.label: BaseAgent.__init__
nodes.docstring: Initialise agent with shared infrastructure and load model from config.

nodes.label: BaseAgent._call_api
nodes.docstring:
Send messages to Claude via the Gatekeeper API gateway.

All budget checking and token recording happens inside
gatekeeper.execute() — this method never calls the client directly.

nodes.label: BaseAgent._handle_tool_use
nodes.docstring:
Execute tool calls recursively until Claude returns a text response.

Claude sometimes chains multiple searches before writing the argument.
_MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS depth cap prevents runaway loops.
Token re

nodes.label: BaseAgent._extract_text
nodes.docstring: Pull the first text block from a Claude response.

nodes.label: BaseAgent._strip_markdown
nodes.docstring:
Remove markdown code fences that LLMs sometimes wrap JSON responses in.

Agents are prompted to output raw JSON, but occasionally return
```json ... ``` blocks. Stripping keeps history and returned va

nodes.label: BaseAgent.generate_response
nodes.docstring:
Send a user message, execute any tool calls, return clean text response.

Budget checking and token recording are handled inside gatekeeper.execute()
via _call_api — no explicit check_budget/record ca

nodes.label: __init__
nodes.docstring: Agent implementations: ProAgent, ConAgent, JudgeAgent.

nodes.label: web_search
nodes.docstring: Return a list of {title, url, snippet} dicts from DuckDuckGo.

nodes.label: __init__
nodes.docstring: External tool integrations: web_search.
